messages.author: Meno
messages.text: I think its will be great if we have option to import offline maps in the meshcore app
messages.content_html: I think its will be great if we have option to import offline maps in the meshcore app
messages.reactions_html: 3

messages.author: BerndFfm
messages.text: Offline Maps are important for emergency communication, if there is no internet there is no OpenStreetMap and Google Maps. I can deliver offline maps as mbtiles file or as png files for a lot of countries. I wrote an app for search and rescue missions that handle and download very large offline maps.
messages.content_html: Offline Maps are important for emergency communication, if there is no internet there is no OpenStreetMap and Google Maps. I can deliver offline maps as mbtiles file or as png files for a lot of countries. I wrote an app for search and rescue missions that handle and download very large offline maps.

messages.author: ursmii
messages.text: would it be possible to load and store OpenStreetMap while be connected at home/wifi as for example in many geocaching apps
